page_content:
Prerequisite: MIEH600; or permission of instructor.

MIEH771 Exposure Assessment of Environmental Hazards (3 Credits) Approaches and methods for determining exposure to environmental contaminants. Biomonitoring and genetic methods to detect recent exposures. Optimizing exposure assessment.

Prerequisite: MIEH600; and must have completed a graduate level statistics course with a B- or higher. Or permission of instructor.
